body.description: The content of the extra merchant data should be presented as a string inside this property. The body should be an object containing any of the keys and sub-objects described below serialized to JSON. More information on that object can be found [here](https://docs.klarna.com/api/extra-merchant-data).

content_type.description: The content type of the body. It is usually represented as "application/vnd.klarna.internal.emd-v2+json"
